body:
## Context

L2 verifier issue #2211 (generated 2026-06-23) shows that 8/25 target queries are `drummer-head-term` intent (`{drummer} drum kit`, `{drummer} drum setup`) — **ALL uncited** by Perplexity. Competitors winning: moderndrummer.com, drumeo.com, drummagazine.com.

The one ✅ cited query is `what cymbals does joey jordison use` (gear-detail) — Perplexity extracted from our gear inventory data. Domain authority sufficient; the gap is **content format**: LLMs extract from prose paragraphs for head-terms, not from component-list database rows.

## Pattern gap

Competitors' drummer profiles have a 'Drum Kit Overview' paragraph like: *'Joey Jordison used a Pearl Reference Series kit with 22" bass drum, 10/12/14/16" toms, and Zildjian A Custom cymbals — his primary setup throughout the Iowa era.'* Our profiles list each component in structured DB format (great for gear-detail) but lack the **prose synthesis** LLMs use for head-term responses.

## Target queries (from L2 #2211)
- `joey jordison drum kit` — no competitor cited (we already partially win cymbal query)
- `lars ulrich drum kit` — moderndrummer.com wins
- `dave lombardo drum setup` — no competitor cited
- `gene hoglan drum kit` — drumeo.com, drummagazine.com win
- `george kollias drum kit` — no competitor cited
- `tomas haake drum kit` — no competitor cited
- `danny carey drum setup` — moderndrummer.com wins
- `mike portnoy drum kit` — drummagazine.com, drumeo.com win

## Implementation

**Goal:** Add `kitOverview` prose to top-10 drummer data + render as visible section + FAQPage schema.

**Action:**
1. Add `kitOverview: string` field to drummer data for 10 highest-TAM drummers (Lars, Joey, Mike Portnoy, Danny Carey, Dave Lombardo, Gene Hoglan, Tomas Haake, George Kollias, Mike Mangini, Brann Dailor)
2. Render a 'Kit Overview' section on the drummer profile page (above the gear component list), visible prose paragraph
3. Add FAQPage JSON-LD entry: `'What drum kit does [Drummer] use?'` answered by `kitOverview`
4. If `/public/llms/drummers/<slug>.md` files exist, add a 'Kit Overview' section there too

**Verify:**
- All 10 drummer profile pages render the Kit Overview section
- FAQPage schema includes the new Q/A entry (validate with Google Rich Results Test)
- Next L2 run (weekly) should show improvement on head-term queries

## Done
- [ ] `kitOverview` field added to 10 drummer data entries
- [ ] Kit Overview section renders on profile pages
- [ ] FAQPage schema entries added
- [ ] LLM companion files updated (if they exist)
title: SEO: Add 'complete drum kit overview' prose section to top drummer profiles (LLM head-term citation gap — 8 queries uncited)
